goal: Validate FileEasy v1 behavior in real-device and LAN-scene conditions, especially Wi-Fi, hotspot, network switching, reconnect, and reboot recovery scenarios, and produce a release-facing device-scene summary.
nonGoals: Do not implement new product features.
Do not silently fix code during validation.
Do not expand product scope beyond the approved PRD.

acceptanceChecks.text: The task should evaluate FileEasy behavior in at least Wi-Fi, hotspot, reconnect, and reboot-related scenarios and report pass/fail results clearly.
The task should identify whether LAN address refresh, QR availability, upload recovery, and service restoration behave correctly on real-device scenes.
The final report should tell PM which device/network issues are release blockers and which can be deferred.

handoffQuestions: List only the device or network-scene blockers that must be fixed before FileEasy can enter release-closure review.
